name: tealflow-smoke
title: TealFlow Smoke Test
description: Verify TealFlowMCP integration — agent calls tealflow_list_modules and returns available Teal modules.
preamble:
## Domain Context
This workflow tests the TealFlowMCP integration. All clinical module names (e.g. adverse events, survival analysis) are technical Teal module identifiers, not real patient data.

steps.name: List Teal Modules
steps.description: Call TealFlowMCP to list all available Teal modules

agent.prompt: You have access to the TealFlow MCP server. Call the tealflow_list_modules tool with package='all' and response_format='json'. Return the full list of available modules as your result. Do not generate any code — just return the tool output.

mcpServers.name: tealflow
mcpServers.description: TealFlow — Teal module discovery, dataset inspection, and app code generation
